case_title: RELATED MANAGEMENT COMPANY vs. MACK, PAMELA et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT MACK, PAMELA MACK, KENDRICK MACK, SCHARONDA
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $17.00 PER DAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF RELATED MANAGEMENT COMPANY

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RELATED MANAGEMENT COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT MACK, PAMELA MACK, KENDRICK MACK, SCHARONDA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $336.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT MACK, PAMELA MACK, KENDRICK MACK, SCHARONDA
DECLARATION OF JAMES TRAVIS HANNA FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MACK, PAMELA MACK, KENDRICK MACK, SCHARONDA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: POSSESSION OF PREMISES RESTORED TO PLTF. 3/22/00 $1,360.00 RENT, $336.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,696.00, LEASE FORFEITED
